wrongPassword.testScenario: Verify login with Invalid user credentials
wrongPassword.apiTestScenario: Authentication with Invalid user Credentials should return HTTP 403

blankEmail.testScenario: Verify login with Blank email as input
blankEmail.apiTestScenario: Authentication with Blank email should return HTTP 422

blankPassword.testScenario: Verify login with Blank password as input
blankPassword.apiTestScenario: Authentication with Blank password should return HTTP 422

blankEmailAndPassword.testScenario: Verify login with Blank email and Blank password as input
blankEmailAndPassword.apiTestScenario: Authentication with Blank user credentials should return HTTP 422

invalidEmailFormat.testScenario: Verify login with Invalid email format
invalidEmailFormat.apiTestScenario: Authentication with Invalid email format should return HTTP 403

unregisteredEmail.testScenario: Verify login with unregistered user credentials
unregisteredEmail.apiTestScenario: Authentication with Unregistered user credentials should return HTTP 403
